name: Locking Door
summary: A door (or other portal) slams shut and locks.

name: Mirror Door
summary: The reflection of a wall shows a phantom door where none exists. This door can only be manipulated while viewed through the mirror's reflection.

name: Phantom Footsteps
summary: Audible footsteps approach from behind, but their source is not apparent.

name: Shrieker
summary: This human-sized purple mushroom emits a piercing shriek when disturbed.

name: Shuffling Hall
summary: Four pressure plates along this mirrored hall rotate vertically when stepped on, sending a creature on the pressure plate tipping into an adjacent …

name: Blood-Soaked Soil
summary: The blood of those who died in the area bubbles up from the earth, soaking the soil and turning it into a bloody morass.

name: Confounding Portal
summary: Tiny runes carved around a doorframe or on a hall's walls surreptitiously confound creatures into circling the room or hallway they attempted to exit …

name: Disembodied Voices
summary: Angry spirits breathe down the necks of intruders and whisper haunting threats or messages in their ears.

name: Hidden Pit
summary: A wooden trapdoor covers a pit that’s 10 feet square and 20 feet deep.

name: Snowfall
summary: Loose snow and ice have built up on a high surface, such as a tree branch or a rooftop. Its grip on the surface is tenuous, and it is likely to fall …

name: Cold Spot
summary: The temperature suddenly drops as spectral forces gather in the area.

name: Disorienting Illusions
summary: Illusions cloaking this chamber cause it to appear distorted and constantly shifting, with the room and all its contents appearing tilted, irregular, …

name: Hampering Web
summary: Semitransparent sheets of webbing span the entryway, ready to capture small insects or hamper larger creatures that pass through.

name: Poisoned Lock
summary: A spring-loaded, poisoned spine is hidden near the keyhole of a lock. Disabling or breaking the trap does not disable or break the lock.

name: Reflected Desires
summary: This mirror reflects the viewer's deepest desires.

name: Shattered Window
summary: The anger trapped within a structure shatters a window, showering glass in adjacent spaces.

name: Slamming Door
summary: Pressure-sensitive panels in the floor connect to a stone slab hidden in a hallway’s ceiling.

name: Spell Pitchers
summary: A large pitcher plant occupying a 5-foot space sits seemingly dormant with its dull petals open.

name: Bloodthirsty Toy
summary: A scruffy stuffed bear animates, biting whoever disturbs it.

name: Poisonous Mold
summary: This grotesque fungus releases poisonous spores when a creature comes near.

name: Shrinking Hall
summary: This hallway is designed to shrink as creatures traverse it, making access to the door at the hall's end impossible.

name: Spear Launcher
summary: A wall socket loaded with a spear connects to a floor tile in one 5-foot square.

name: Toppling Furniture
summary: A mischievous spirit pushes a bookshelf over onto a creature.

name: Web Lurker Noose
summary: Discreet webbing at throat level snags a creature that walks into it.

name: Entombed Spirit
summary: The wall bulges out in the shape of a howling humanoid face as it twists and forms tendrils reaching for nearby creatures. This haunt is formed when …

name: Cracked Earth
summary: This 20-foot-by-20-foot patch of ground is cobwebbed with cracks and fissures that crumble when a creature steps on it.

name: Electric Latch Rune
summary: An invisible rune imprinted on a door latch releases a powerful electric discharge.

name: False Floor
summary: The floor in this chamber is an illusion, which conceals a 40-foot drop to the true floor below. Additionally, the area beneath the floor is …

name: Phantom Jailer
summary: A spirit appears and arrests the creature by clamping manacles around their wrists. Disable DC 18  Athletics  to seize the manacles from the spirit, …

name: Treacherous Scree
summary: The footing on this sloped ground appears to be stable at first glance, but the tiny rocks that cover it are loosely packed and prone to slipping.

name: Violent Shove
summary: An invisible force bats creatures aside, hurling them into a nearby wall.

name: Web Lurker Deadfall
summary: A web tripwire lets loose a bundle of boulders that fall on all targets within a 10-foot square.

name: Drowning Pit
summary: A trapdoor covers a 10-foot-square pit that’s 30 feet deep and has 5 feet of water at the bottom. Four water spouts in the walls connect to hidden …

name: Quicksand
summary: A 15-foot-wide patch of water and sand attempts to submerge creatures that step onto it.

name: Final Words
summary: As a creature touches a hand-written letter, they witness the letter's author scribe it in the past; each pen stroke across the page carves the …

name: Scythe Blades
summary: Two blades, each hidden in a 15-foot-long ceiling groove, are both connected to a trip wire.

name: Steam Vents
summary: Large pressurized pipes connected to a trip wire are rigged to release a blast of steam on trespassers.

name: Titanic Flytrap
summary: On the surface, a titanic flytrap appears to be a patch of the more common flytrap plant, but beneath murky waters it hides a far larger set of jaws, …

name: Gravehall Trap
summary: When a living creature crosses the midpoint of the trapped tunnel, necromantic magic partially animates the corpses buried in the walls and ceiling.

name: Sadistic Conductor
summary: A phantom conductor appears with a flourish, causing spectral instruments with razor-like strings to appear in the hands of those present. As the …

name: Spinning Blade Pillar
summary: A metal pole with three razor-sharp spinning blades is hidden in the floor, connected to trigger plates in up to eight floor tiles and a hidden …

name: Ectoplasmic Grasp
summary: A massive ectoplasmic hand forms around a creature and squeezes it.

name: Entrapping Chair
summary: A chair on concealed tracks surges forward, knocking a creature into the chair's seat and trapping them in place with clamping armrests.

name: Fireball Rune
summary: An invisible rune creates an invisible, spherical magical sensor with a 20-foot radius.

name: Spectral Reflection
summary: The reflection in the mirror subtly twists and distorts, its expression taking on an unnerving sneer of malice.

name: Grasping Dead
summary: Hands of the buried dead rise from the ground, grabbing and tearing at creatures in the area to drag them underground.

name: Primal Chaos Aura
trait: Complex, Kaiju, Magical, Mythic, Primal, Rare
summary: Primal magic becomes unpredictable near areas where  Agyra  lairs, sometimes to hazardous effect.

name: False Step Floor
summary: Each time a creature enters the room, it slips through the floor, tumbles through an interdimensional void, and falls back into the room through the …

name: Ghostly Choir
summary: A choir of lost souls rises out of the floor, singing an eerie chant that terrifies its listeners and buffets their bodies with walls of sound.

name: Hallucination Powder Trap
summary: A tube of hallucinogenic powder armed with a miniature explosive is connected to a doorknob or similar latch.

name: Clone Mirrors
summary: Two opposing mirrors spawn illusory duplicates of creatures in the hall in an unending tide.

name: Wheel of Misery
summary: An ornate wheel set into a wall—divided into six segments with colored runes on each—is controlled by a magical sensor that detects any creature …

name: Pharaoh's Ward
summary: A curse is imbued on an entryway’s threshold.

name: Sportlebore
summary: A sportlebore hides amid victuals on a plate of food or within a pack of trail rations.

name: Weight of Guilt
summary: Influenced by the guilt and regrets of the dead, creatures are wrapped in weighted chains that embody their own sins.

name: Wind Surge
summary: Hurricane-force winds rip through the area as  Agyra  flies past.

name: Eternal Flame
summary: A raging spectral inferno arises out of thin air, strengthening all  undead  creatures within its area. This haunt most often arises from the charred …

name: Mana Whorl
summary: This 15-foot-wide patch of destabilized sand attempts to submerge creatures who wield magic. A desert tree with dense bright green foliage, pale pink …

name: Frenetic Musician
summary: A spirit musician rises out of an instrument and plays a frantic, bone-shaking melody.

name: Insistent Privacy Fence
summary: A stretch of fence is electrified by a hidden Stasian coil.

name: Yellow Mold
summary: Poisonous mold spores assault nearby creatures.

name: Confounding Betrayal
summary: Allies appear to shed their disguises and reveal themselves to be malevolent monsters.

name: Constricting Hall
summary: A hall's four walls become fluid and elastic when a creature reaches the hall's midpoint.

name: Poisoned Dart Gallery
summary: Countless holes to launch poison darts from line a long hallway with a hidden control panel on the far end.

name: Bottomless Pit
summary: An iron trapdoor covers an infinitely deep 10-footsquare pit.

name: Green Slime
summary: A caustic green film clings to the ceiling above, watching for prey to pass beneath it.

name: Exhaling Portal
summary: Magic runes carved into a doorframe connect a door to the Plane of Air when opened, blowing creatures down the connecting hall.

name: Spirit Cyclone
summary: A cyclone of angry spirits surges around the area.

name: Blood Tears
summary: A wailing spirit appears and gouges their own eyes. As they do, blood seeps from the eyes of those who witness the act, obscuring their vision.

name: Bloodthirsty Urge
summary: An object haunted by the echoes of a vicious mind attempts to kill someone who comes near.

name: Lava Flume Tubes
summary: Four gated channels carved into stone allow lava to flow into a 15-foot-tall room; the floor can withdraw to allow the hardened lava to fall into a …

name: Perilous Flash Flood
summary: Whether made up of water rushing through the streets that sweeps up dangerous debris along the way or a less natural substance bursting free of its …

name: Hammer Of Forbiddance
summary: An enormous hammer at an edifice’s entrance swings down in an attempt to damage a creature entering an area, push it back, and prevent it from going …

name: Jealous Abjurer
summary: A robe-clad spirit rises out of the floor, pointing an accusing finger.

name: Lightning's Dance
summary: Electricity suffuses an area where  Agyra  has used her lightning breath multiple times.

name: Desperate Hunger
summary: A skeletally thin spirit appears, weeping as it shoves earth and stones down its throat in an effort to stave off hunger.

name: Polymorph Trap
summary: A Druidic glyph attempts to transform a trespasser into an animal.

name: Flensing Blades
summary: A whirling tornado of spectrally propelled glass and steel slices whatever it touches to ribbons.

name: Telekinetic Swarm Trap
summary: Three innocuous decorations instilled with telekinetic magic pull objects and pieces of the room itself into spinning clouds of debris that attack …

name: Thalassophobic Pool
summary: The pool sucks in creatures that fall into it, making them sink into its endless depths.

name: Trump of the Oliphaunt
summary: An overwhelming trumpeting sound vibrates and suffuses the area, causing everything to slow.

name: Planar Rift
summary: A rift attempts to draw creatures into another plane (the GM chooses the specific plane).

name: Bounding Hounds
summary: Three phantom hounds chase down intruders, damaging any they pass through.

name: Distortion Mirror
summary: Fun-house mirrors distort a viewer's reflection, painfully reshaping their body to match what appears in the reflected images.

name: Quaking Slither
summary: Ebeshra slithers across the ground, causing the earth to tremble as though from a powerful earthquake.

name: Boneburst
summary: A low howl rises from the ground, gathering strength as scraps of ancient armor, bone fragments, and clumps of earth rise into the air. Crimson vapor …

name: Darkside Mirror
summary: A magic mirror replaces characters with malicious mirror duplicates from another dimension.

name: Malevolent Mannequins
summary: A host of violent spirits possess three clockwork mannequins, and each lashes out at any creatures that dare walk near.

name: Plummeting Doom
summary: Four vengeful spirits grab interlopers and toss them off the edge of a nearby 120-foot-tall cliff.

name: Collapsing Structure (Ebeshra)
summary: Ebeshra brushes against a structure, possibly causing it to collapse.

name: Ghost Stampede
summary: Four massive skulls of aurochs, enormous wild cattle, rise into the air, each trailing its ghostly body behind it.

name: Cannibalistic Echoes
summary: A pack of cannibalistic spirits swarm through the area, devouring living creatures.

name: Dance of Death
summary: An eerie orchestra compels all who hear it to dance until they collapse from exhaustion.

name: Frozen Moment
summary: Warding magic attempts to trap intruders or would-be thieves in a disrupted time flow.

name: Grasp of the Damned
summary: These desperate spirits are the echoes of people who committed great atrocities in the name of an evil god. Now, they are left with only the …

name: Sigil of Deepest Fears
summary: An arcane sigil forces creatures to confront their greatest fear.

name: Shrouded Assailant
summary: A spirit steps out of a covered mirror, pulling off and becoming shrouded in the cloth, which reveals the mirror. The shrouded figure attacks the …

name: Flood of Spirits
summary: A wave of spirits fly through the area, passing right through the living.

name: Storm Discharge
trait: Divine, Electricity, Environmental, Evocation, Kaiju, Rare
summary: Ebeshra aligns its crystalline form to produce a blast of lightning that charges the surrounding area with electrical energy.

name: Banshee's Symphony
summary: A magically contagious wail of the banshee spell is trapped in the larynx of an invisible, mummified elf.

name: Vorpal Executioner
summary: A wickedly sharp saw blade descends and travels along grooves in a complex path throughout the room, attempting to decapitate everyone within.

name: Siphoning Spirit
summary: A formless spirit drains life from the living, becoming progressively visible as its victims weaken.

name: Crystal Pin
summary: Ebeshra fires a crystal at a creature to pin them onto the  Material Plane .

name: Glimpse Grave
summary: A tombstone bears the name of those who look upon it, causing their hearts to seize.

name: Spirit Window
summary: Spirits trapped inside a haunted window harm those who touch the window.

name: Second Chance
summary: Powerful warding magic tied to an object or location tries to regress the ages of a creature and its allies.

name: Planar Tear
trait: Complex, Conjuration, Divine, Environmental, Kaiju, Rare, Teleportation
summary: Ebeshra opens a massive rift in the  Material Plane  that pulls nearby creatures into another plane entirely. The rift is typically to a random plane …

name: Armageddon Orb
summary: A roiling red orb, forged from a drop of the god  Rovagug ’s blood, rains fire from the sky when a specified condition is met.
